case_title: HAWKINS, IVORY JOE VS BANK OF AMERICA (C/O LEGAL DEPT. #3017)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWKINS, IVORY JOE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA (C/O LEGAL DEPT. #3017) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HAWKINS, IVORY JOE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA (C/O LEGAL DEPT. #3017) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEF. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DATE RESERVED FOR OCT.11,1996 AT 8:30 AM SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE $10.00 FEE ATTACHED W/THE REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-11-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO WILLIAM NINNES AUTH AGENT FOR RECEIPT OF PROCESS FOR B OF A RETURNED SIGNED.
